title: Extraction method F (CR)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"2qnk","text":"Gen-IALFirst All-tissue DNA extraction kit -This protocol provides an efficient DNA extraction and purification of historic sample (tissue material)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Cut tissue (25-50 mg) into small pieces.
Add 500 µl Lyse 1. undetermined, Lyse 1
Add 50 µl Lyse 2. undetermined, Lyse 2
Add 10 µl Proteinase K. undetermined, Proteinase K
Incubate in a thermomixer at 65°C for 12 hours. 12:00:00, Incubation at 65°C
Centrifuge for 10 min at 13000rpm. 00:10:00, Centrifugation
Discard supernatant without disturbing the pellet.
Add 375 µl Lyse 3 undetermined, Lyse 3
Vortex for 20 sec. 00:00:20, Vortex
Leave it for 5 min in the freezer (-20°C) 00:05:00, Freezer
Centrifuge 20 min at 13000rpm. 00:20:00, Centrifugation
Transfer the supernatant in a new tube.
Add 640 µl isopropanol. undetermined, Isopropanol
Centrifuge for 15 min at 13000 rpm. 00:15:00, Centrifugation
Remove the supernatant (don´t touch the pellet).
Add 150 µl ethanol. undetermined, Ethanol
Centrifuge for 5 min at 13000 rpm. 00:05:00, Centrifugation
Remove the ethanol with a pipette (don´t touch the pellet).
Dry the pellet (37°C open lid max 5 min). 00:05:00, Dry
Re-suspend the pellet in 100 µl Buffer AE. undetermined, Buffee AE
Measure DNA concentration on Nanodrop (Thermo Fischer Scientific, Darmstadt, DE).
Mix by inversion.
creator: Faezah Mohd Salleh
